2314680.name: TileDeck TD
2314680.description:
About


TileDeck TD mixes Tower Defense and DeckBuilding with elements of Roguelike .

Expand your Kingdom, trigger discovery events, build up your defense and power up your abilities with unique cards.

Expand your Kingdom


Use Sector Cards to expand your Kingdom. More sectors means more places to build up upon. Also, new sectors will trigger Discovery Events.

Base Building and Tower Defense


You can build defensive Towers and other Buildings with their unique abilities.
You can also play abilities.
